hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -r "$root/hooks/inject-router.sh" ]; then output=$(/bin/sh "$root/hooks/inject-router.sh" SessionStart 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$output" ] && printf '%s' "$output"; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root=$env:PLUGIN_ROOT; if ($root) { $script=Join-Path $root 'hooks\inject-router.ps1'; $powershell=Get-Command powershell.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($powershell -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script -PathType Leaf)) { try { $output=& $powershell.Source -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $script SessionStart 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $output) { [Console]::Out.Write(($output -join [Environment]::NewLine)) } } catch {} } }; exit 0

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -r "$root/hooks/inject-router.sh" ]; then output=$(/bin/sh "$root/hooks/inject-router.sh" SubagentStart 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$output" ] && printf '%s' "$output"; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root=$env:PLUGIN_ROOT; if ($root) { $script=Join-Path $root 'hooks\inject-router.ps1'; $powershell=Get-Command powershell.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($powershell -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $script -PathType Leaf)) { try { $output=& $powershell.Source -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $script SubagentStart 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $output) { [Console]::Out.Write(($output -join [Environment]::NewLine)) } } catch {} } }; exit 0
